scripts.dev:infra:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.yaml -f docker-compose.dev.yaml up -d postgres n8n gotenberg
scripts.dev:infra:down: docker compose -f docker-compose.yaml -f docker-compose.dev.yaml stop postgres n8n gotenberg
scripts.dev:infra:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.yaml -f docker-compose.dev.yaml logs -f postgres n8n gotenberg
